title: rubus angloserpens
intro: Rubus angloserpens, also known as the Alpine Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus angloserpens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus angloserpens include infusions, tinctures, and dried fruits, which can be consumed as a tea or added to food to reap its medicinal benefits.
